mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_message WHERE 1=1 AND is_read=#{isRead} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_message SET is_read=1 WHERE message_id=#{messageId}
UPDATE sys_message SET is_read=1 WHERE is_read=0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message WHERE is_read=0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_message (message_id, title, content, message_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{messageId},#{title},#{content},#{messageType},0,NOW())
